prediction.reasoning: BRK-B historically exhibits low volatility (~15-20% annualized) due to Berkshire Hathaway's diversified holdings and conservative management. Confidence intervals are based on normal distribution assumptions around the modest expected drift, with widening ranges reflecting increased uncertainty at higher confidence levels.
